mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visit_history (patient_id, kiosk_id, department_id, visit_type, status, visited_at) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{kioskId}, #{departmentId}, #{visitType}, #{status}, #{visitedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_id, kiosk_id, department_id, visit_type, status, payment_status, visited_at FROM visit_history WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY visited_at DESC

SELECT id, patient_id, kiosk_id, department_id, visit_type, status, payment_status, visited_at FROM visit_history WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND DATE(visited_at) = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY visited_at DESC LIMIT 1
